{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185612E7BFA4E1D19A075F0727"}"},"total":637},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574438685922280216","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无意中发现的宝藏书籍，每个人物刻画的都很生动，就连每个配角炮灰都刻画的很有特点，给读者们留下很深刻的印象，剧情前后衔接，不拖拉就像主角宋渊的脾气，不隔夜，能动手绝不吵吵。
感情线民族大义，爱民如子，手足情深，智谋双绝。能赚钱也能花钱。那么尊贵的黄长孙，每天不得闲。因为太多人等着他去杀。
流泪过，激动过，笑过恨过。。。。。等待过。。。。
等你宋渊赶紧来，杀杀杀杀杀杀"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763564079,"group_id":"7502713480403766334","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/VV1JGoMPMCSzl4vji/Zj8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"100110937814","user_name":"重楼喜欢抹茶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100110937814","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502713480403766334","book_info":{"abstract":"（爽文，主角半点不受气，有仇绝不隔夜！）
无cp+基建+科举+种田+架空+权谋古代
爽文向，杀伐果断！！
这世间没有公道，那便杀出公道！
世家让所有人无路可走，那便杀出一条路来。
县令之子玩弄人命，杀！想报复？连你爹一起宰了！
世家疯狂侵占百姓之田？那便叫青州没有世家！
外邦狗敢杀入村子，那我便杀你五座城赎罪！
庙里僧人行不法之事，丧尽天良，那便替佛祖灭妖僧！
太子妃为了杀他派尽死士，用尽招数！
那进京便先杀你这一国太子之妃！
一道圣旨封他忠义候，背后人人却叫血衣侯！
一席青衣，血染九州，忠义候所过之处，整个世界都在为他让路！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/42b6d235d1b84e064a1ffcee217e3573","author":"这鱼想吃猫了","author_id":"","book_id":"7502713480403766334","book_name":"穿成农家子？烂命一条就是干","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7502713564075917886","read_count":"40939","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1494383"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"655","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,无女主,基建,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/65625786c60ed4678962e9fa9d143d62~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447372&x-signature=Ss2L1%2Fn5NUFSpvk15wI9UWPpXwk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1574930695077207","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"611"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185612E7BFA4E1D19A075F0727"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":58592,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":207795,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7860},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1763565359,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601426414844773145","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值10分，作者好有意思，写的太好啦，刚要掉泪儿又让人笑，真是折磨人[捂脸]，赶紧多找矿多挖煤，多备粮，把火药造点，打仗也快不是[大笑]。真想进去演两集，十几年没上班了，看的我热血沸腾，竟然有想上班的冲动。[大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769848952,"group_id":"7502713480403766334","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"涂涂改改又是一年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyL9TSmAFsBdQLh8eXDxq8c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e22781a4f7cb4d758a906e8b094b136a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788922&x-signature=2PYVZtcg630Zi0ur4jLMHiDhrog%3D","user_id":"111200813790","user_name":"舞动的北极狐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111200813790","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502713480403766334","book_info":{"abstract":"（爽文，主角半点不受气，有仇绝不隔夜！）
